summary: Backend pytest (16/16 passing) + Playwright UI flows all green. Verified seeded data (5 committee incl. Maulana Alauddin/ulama, 2 news incl. notice, 2 events, bank settings: holder=Md. Nakibullah, branch contains Kashinathpur, account=20501650204309016, bKash/Nagad=01622564511). Admin login → /admin works, all 7 admin tabs present and clickable. Public CRUD/auth flows for news/events/committee/gallery/members/contact/settings all functional with Bearer token (no withCredentials).

issues: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 on every public page load (expected when no token, but generates console noise — could be silenced by skipping the call when no token is stored in localStorage)

action_items: Optional: in frontend AuthContext, skip the /api/auth/me probe on initial load when no access_token is present in localStorage to avoid noisy 401s in console.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth: JWT-based with Bearer token from localStorage — fine for the iteration. test_credentials.md mentions httpOnly cookies but actual implementation uses Bearer (per agent context note: withCredentials removed). Update memory doc to match implementation.
Backend test_settings mutates real settings (sets youtube_url=https://youtube.com/test) without restoring — minor pollution; consider snapshot/restore pattern.
Frontend: ensure fetch of /api/auth/me is gated on token presence to prevent 401 spam.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created — verified existing seeded committee (5), news (2), events (2), and settings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 backend pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass. Playwright validated: notice-alert + close, lang-toggle (lang-bn↔lang-en body class), committee tabs (all/executive/ulama) + Alauddin in ulama tab, donation page (holder/account/bank-name testids correct values), members + contact form submissions, login → /admin redirect, all 7 admin tabs (news/events/committee/gallery/members/messages/settings) present and clickable, gallery page renders 4 photos. Only minor cosmetic concern: 401 console noise from /api/auth/me on unauthenticated pages.
